STRUGGLER-AMMO.title: Ammo
STRUGGLER-AMMO.description: Spent by cannon and crossbow cards. You start each combat with 3 [gold]Ammo[/gold] (up to 6).
STRUGGLER-BERSERK.title: Berserk
STRUGGLER-BERSERK.description: Attacks deal 50% more damage. Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold] each turn. Take damage at end of turn.
STRUGGLER-ELITE_HUNTER.title: Elite Hunter
STRUGGLER-ELITE_HUNTER.description: Attacks deal 2 additional damage this combat.
STRUGGLER-STRUGGLE.title: Struggle
